history.content: Startup is clear but partially degraded: task and schedule systems are currently unavailable in this snapshot, so there are no live current-task or upcoming-schedule details to act on right now. Today’s key note says the last weekly review succeeded by combining `schedule_job` and `task_control` telemetry, with the main issue being inconsistent status signals (running vs paused) that should be explicitly flagged in future reports. Where things left off: you were repeatedly testing boot-summary flow and preparing/running the weekly self-improvement performance review workflow.
